summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Telegram bot order flow with focus on input validations and status tracking. All requested features tested successfully including dimension validation (150-3000mm), quantity validation (1-30), color selection by installation type, impost recommendations for large sizes, and status history tracking. Backend implementation is robust and fully functional.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: User login test failing due to timestamp mismatch in test design - not application bug
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Test design issue where registration timestamp differs from login timestamp

passed_tests: Dimension input validation - Valid widths (150, 800, 1500, 2500, 3000mm)
Dimension input validation - Invalid widths properly rejected (149, 50, 3001, 5000mm)
Dimension input validation - Valid heights (150, 1200, 1800, 2500, 3000mm)
Dimension input validation - Invalid heights properly rejected (149, 25, 3001, 4000mm)
Quantity input validation - Valid quantities (1, 5, 15, 25, 30 units)
Quantity input validation - Invalid quantities properly rejected (0, -5, 31, 50, 100 units)
Color selection - Door type with limited colors (белый, коричневый)
Color selection - Roller type with limited colors (белый, коричневый)
Color selection - Window types with full colors (белый, коричневый, антрацит, RAL)
Impost recommendation logic - Large sizes >1200mm trigger recommendation
Impost recommendation logic - Small sizes <1200mm do not trigger recommendation
Impost orientation selection (вертикально, горизонтально)
Status history tracking - Multiple status changes properly logged
Status history tracking - All entries have required fields (status, changed_at)
Telegram /start command with inline keyboard (main menu displayed)
Callback query handling for all main menu buttons (new_order, my_orders, contact, help)
Order type selection - All 5 installation types (проемная variations, дверная, роллетная)
Mesh type selection - All 4 mesh types (стандартное, антипыль, антимошка, антикошка)
Navigation callbacks working (back_main, back_type)
Push notifications on status changes (in_progress, ready, delivered)
Basic Telegram webhook commands (/help, /orders, unknown commands)
Backend API health endpoints (200 OK)
User registration with telegram_id support
Admin login and authentication
Price calculation for all item types with impost and mesh variations
Order creation and retrieval through API
Admin functionality (stats, orders, users management)
Admin order status updates with push notifications
Google Sheets export functionality
